description: A reader should receive snapshot objects via SNAPSHOT_OFFER during first-time sync when the seed advertises snapshot-sync capability.

assertions.description: Reader successfully completed sync and received snapshot objects from a snapshot-capable seed.
Reader's post-sync store contains the snapshot object published by the seed.

notes: Proves snapshot-assisted catch-up end-to-end: seed populates snapshot, advertises snapshot-sync, reader receives snapshot via SNAPSHOT_OFFER.
The sync engine automatically detects and advertises snapshot-sync capability when snapshot objects are present in the peer store.
